hooks.command: FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.env|*.env.*) echo 'BLOCK: .env files contain secrets — edit manually' >&2; exit 2;; */bun.lock|*/bun.lockb) echo 'BLOCK: Lock files should not be edited directly' >&2; exit 2;; esac

FILEPATH="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH$TOOL_INPUT_file_path"; case "$FILEPATH" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd /Users/jason/dev/ai-stack/ai-coding-cli && if command -v tsgo >/dev/null 2>&1; then bun run ts:check 2>&1 | tail -20; else echo '[hook] tsgo not installed, skipping type check'; fi;; esac
